nasb.text: When he goes in to make atonement in the holy place, no one shall be in the tent of meeting until he comes out, that he may make atonement for himself and for his household and for all the assembly of Israel.

esv.text: No one may be in the tent of meeting from the time he enters to make atonement in the Holy Place until he comes out and has made atonement for himself and for his house and for all the assembly of Israel.

cnv.text: 他進入至聖所贖罪的時候，會幕裡不可有人；直到他為自己和家人，以及以色列全體會眾，贖了罪出來為止。

ccb.text: 从他进入圣所为自己全家和以色列全体会众赎罪开始，直到他赎完罪出来为止，任何人都不可待在会幕里。
